name: learning-javascript
description: A comprehensive collection of JavaScript practice files covering fundamental to advanced concepts

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const files=fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f=>/(\.js|,js)$/.test(f)).sort();if(!files.length){console.error('No JavaScript files found');process.exit(1);}for(const f of files){const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['--check',f],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.status!==0)process.exit(r.status??1);}console.log('All files passed syntax validation');"

author: Umang
